characters.description: The main character. The show revolves around the lives of her and her friends. She is a shy girl and a little clumsy. She dreams to fit in and be popular. She has an animated inner voice thatbreaks the fourth wallto reveal her thoughts and feelings. A-Cup Angst: She's aware of her lack of breasts as seen in "Between a Rock and a Bra Place". She persuades her mom into letting her buy a bra at the mall, only to realize in the end that she didn't need one after all and just wanted tofit in with the crowd.In the pilot This is apparently one of the reasons given why Lizzie is upset over Kate no longer being her friend. She says Kate blossomed early and became popular as a result and rejected Miranda and Lizzie. In the pilot This is apparently one of the reasons given why Lizzie is upset over Kate no longer being her friend. She says Kate blossomed early and became popular as a result and rejected Miranda and Lizzie. Aesop Amnesia: Lizzie learns her lessons; she just doesn'trememberthose lessons. Justified due toStatus Quo Is God. All Love Is Unrequited: For Ethan. Larry Tudgeman also had an unrequited crush on her. Gordo has an unrequited crush on her.

characters.name: Elizabeth Brooke "Lizzie"McGuire
characters.description: The main character. The show revolves around the lives of her and her friends. She is a shy girl and a little clumsy. She dreams to fit in and be popular. She has an animated inner voice thatbreaks the fourth wallto reveal her thoughts and feelings. A-Cup Angst: She's aware of her lack of breasts as seen in "Between a Rock and a Bra Place". She persuades her mom into letting her buy a bra at the mall, only to realize in the end that she didn't need one after all and just wanted tofit in with the crowd.In the pilot This is apparently one of the reasons given why Lizzie is upset over Kate no longer being her friend. She says Kate blossomed early and became popular as a result and rejected Miranda and Lizzie. In the pilot This is apparently one of the reasons given why Lizzie is upset over Kate no longer being her friend. She says Kate blossomed early and became popular as a result and rejected Miranda and Lizzie. Aesop Amnesia: Lizzie learns her lessons; she just doesn'trememberthose lessons. Justified due toStatus Quo Is God. All Love Is Unrequited: For Ethan. Larry Tudgeman also had an unrequited crush on her. Gordo has an unrequited crush on her.

characters.name: Miranda Sanchez
characters.description: Lizzie's best female friend. She is the most self-conscious character in the show. She has a hard time dealing with being a teenager and growing up. Bad "Bad Acting": In one episode, she stars in the school play, but it turns out that she has no acting talent. At the end of the episode, she realized that her real talent is singing. Deadpan Snarker: Miranda is witty and never afraid to speak her mind. Heterosexual Life-Partners: With Lizzie. Jerkass Ball: Anytime Miranda sees a chance to make herself more popular, shewilltake it, often going to extremes that the equally peer-conscious Lizzie wouldn't dare touch:In the pilot, she agrees to have her mother create tattoos for Kate, Claire and the rest of theirGirl Posseahead of a pool party to which Lizzie can't attend (due to her grandmother's birthday falling on the same date) and Gordo wasn't invited to begin with. In exchange, she's gifted a space within said posse and resolves to go to the party alone despite previously promising Lizzie she wouldn't.She joins Gordo in declaring her personal fealty to Lizzie after the latter becomes a model, with the sole intent on piggybacking on her best friend's perks.Then there's "Come Fly With Me". After Gordo abandons his Rat Pack hobby-due to her and Lizzie exploiting it to impress the popular crowd-just before a school dance, she initially resolves to press forward anyway. To the point of disregarding Lizzie's warnings and dragging her to the model plane park (Gordo's replacement hobby) and demanding Gordo give them all their answers right then and there. Cue an epicThe Reason You Suckspeech against both girls.In another episode, she hosts a "Populars-Only" house party (Lizzie and Gordo being the sole exceptions) and makes a specific point of deliberately excluding Larry Tudgeman (and presumably all other "nerds/geeks" as well), refusing to listen to her friends' insistence that Larry is a much cooler person than he's given credit for. Lizzie and Gordo are then forced to dis

characters.name: David "Gordo" Gordon
characters.description: Lizzie's best male friend, and a very loyal one at that as seen in the movie. They were friends since a very young age. Gordo is a straight A student, being the smartest and most practical kid on the show. Big Damn Kiss: Shares one withLizziein the movie. Book Smart: He's a straight A student. His friends Lizzie and Miranda are notBook Dumbbut they are both B students, and in one episode Gordo points out they rarely get As, much to their annoyance. Cannot Spit It Out: He has a crush on Lizzie but has trouble confessing his love. Childhood Friend Romance:He and Lizzie become anOfficial Couplein the movie.

characters.name: MattMcGuire
characters.description: Lizzie's younger brother. He can be annoying and very clever. Regardless, he does care about Lizzie and his relationship with her is no different than any other sibling relationship. The Ace: He's done quite a fair bit of things in his youth with success. Alliterative Name:MattMcguire. Annoying Younger Sibling: Towards Lizzie, whom he often pranks and insults. Lizzie can give as good as she gets though. Aw, Look! They Really Do Love Each Other: Regardless of their squabbles, he and Lizzie will come through for one another when the chips are down.

characters.name: JoMcGuire
characters.description: Lizzie's mother. Always gives advice to Lizzie and is sometimes strict to her children when needed. Good Parents: She knows what's right for her children and only uses aggression as a form ofTough Love. Hair of Gold, Heart of Gold: Like her daughter Lizzie. Happily Married: To Sam. Mama Bear: She gets pretty defensive if her children are messed with.

characters.name: SamMcGuire
characters.description: Lizzie's father. Like most sitcom dads, he isn't the brightest, but he's a nice enough guy. Bumbling Dad: He is a well-meaning person and very nice, but not always the best with advice. However, he does get a moment to shine when comforting his daughter after Jo couldn't. Happily Married: To Jo. The Klutz: Like Lizzie. Nice Guy: He always tries his best to help Lizzie.

characters.name: Kate Sanders
characters.description: TheAlpha Bitchand an old friend of Lizzie's. They were the best of friends but had a falling out shortly before the series. She becomes the main antagonist of most of the series. Alpha Bitch: She's the most popular as well as the meanest girl at school. She's very prone to harassing Lizzie and Miranda. Big Bad: For most of the show she's the main antagonist, though in the movieshe has aHeel–Face Turnand the role is taken over by Paolo Valisari. The Bully: Being theAlpha Bitch, she's quite psychologically abusive to Lizzie and Miranda. Buxom Beauty Standard: The given reason for why she suddenly became popular is because she was the first girl in her grade to develop. Secretly being a year older than everyone else probably helped with that.

characters.name: Ethan Craft
characters.description: A handsome and popular yet dimwitted boy in Lizzie's school. Almost all the girls want him and he's pretty nice (except in the first season). Better as Friends: While not very bright, he’s extremely aware he and Lizzie have no future together and no chemistry so he tries to gently dissuade her. Big Man on Campus: The most popular and good-looking boy in the school. Brainless Beauty: He may be attractive, but also dimwitted and clueless. Characterization Marches On: In the first season, he was more-or-less a male version of Kate, but in later seasons, he became a much nicer person.

characters.name: Larry Tudgeman
characters.description: The least popular boy at Lizzie's school. Despite this he is pretty nice to people, and gets a friendly enough treatment from Lizzie. He had a crush on Lizzie, but when she decides not to return the feelings, he was pretty understanding. Abhorrent Admirer: To Lizzie and, on occasion, Miranda and Kate. All Love Is Unrequited: For Lizzie. All of the Other Reindeer: Though the occasional episode shows he does have some people to pal around with, he's consistently unpopular with the larger school body. "My Fair Larry" plays this more seriously, as he's the only recognizable student not invited to Miranda's party; Lizzie feels so bad for him walking off dejected and everyone around him not even noticing him. Butt-Monkey: Unpopular and bullied by other students.

characters.name: Claire Miller
characters.description: Kate's lackey and current best friend (until the movie). Backstabbing the Alpha Bitch: When Kate dislocates her shoulder, Claire takes over as the queen bee. Claire ended up being much worse than Kate, whichgot Lizzie to wishthat Kate was the originalAlpha Bitchagain. Beta Bitch: While generally the second-in-command to Kate, she can actually be a lot meaner than Kate herself at time. Dragon-in-Chief: When given the opportunity. Jerkass: Unlike Kate, she never shows having someHidden Depthsor any redeeming qualities.

characters.name: Lanny Onasis
characters.description: Matt's best friend who hasn't spoken a single word in the series. Creepy Child: Sam finds his tendency to not talk creepy, though Jo thinks that he's just shy. Famous Ancestor: He's related to Crispus Attucks. Silent Bob: He never speaks, but Matt seems to have no problem communicating with him. Matt seems to be one of the few who can understand him no problem, much to the confusion of his parents. Stranger still whenMatt and Lizzie switch bodies, Lizzie is able to easily understand what Lanny 'said' before Toon!Lizzie (Lizzie's inner self) was confused by how she understood him. Token Minority: One of the few black recurring characters.

characters.name: Paolo Valisari
characters.description: Big Bad:He tries to manipulate Lizzie into performing onstage as Isabella so he can destroy Isabella's career and humiliate Lizzie onstage by fooling everyone into thinking that Isabella lip syncs. Bitch in Sheep's Clothing:He seems very charming and sincere but it's just a cover for his true, vile nature. Blatant Lies:He lied to Lizzie about Isabella lip-synching and him actually singing as well as Isabella's personality. Face of an Angel, Mind of a Demon:He's very handsome and suave and a total bastard underneath. Faux Affably Evil:He's pretty likable before hisEvil Planis revealed.

characters.name: Isabella Parigi
characters.description: Paolo's ex-girlfriend who looks identical to Lizzie, except for the fact that she's a brunette rather than a blonde. Paolo befriends Lizzie because of this. Confronting Your Imposter: When she returns to Roma, she is understandably upset when she learns of Lizzie impersonating her, and wonders who is she. Gordo tells her and the two realize Paolo's plan. Identical Stranger: She and Lizzie look pretty much identical to each other—the only actual physical difference between them is their hair colors, with Isabella being a brunette and Lizzie being a blonde. Idol Singer: She is an Italian pop star. Meaningful Name: Isabella is the Italian translation of Elizabeth, Lizzie’s full name.

characters.name: Miss Angela Ungermeyer
characters.description: The principal of the high school Lizzie and Gordo will be attending, as well as the chaperone of the class. Deadpan Snarker: She spends a lot of her screen time snarking at people with deadpan quips. Drill Sergeant Nasty: Well, she’s aprincipal, but she definitely evokes this trope with her sharp tongue and no-nonsense attitude. She’s even accompanied by military drums in her first scene. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: She starts to show off her softer side towards Gordo and Sergei at the end. Large Ham: Her snarky,scenery-chewingpersonality makes her one of the funniest characters in the film. What more could you expect from a character played by Alex Borstein?

characters.name: Sergei
characters.description: Everyone Has Standards: He quits his job as Paolo's bodyguard, because he was disgusted by his plan to hurtLizzie.Sergei:Lizzie Mcguire is a nice girl, you tried to hurt her. Heel–Face Turn:After Paolo is exposed. Last-Minute Hookup: He and Miss Ungermeyer are shown briefly flirting with each other near the end of the movie, after Sergei compliments her on her care for her students, and it's implied that they eventually hookup.
